title: Collection
description:
Collection is a medium to lightweight custom modpack made for a private server. 
The goal is to add to the Minecraft experience without trivializing or departing far from core vanilla gameplay, while still adding different ways to play.
body:
Collection is a simple modpack based around Vanilla, Origins, and Create gameplay, additionally adding light improvements to existing vanilla systems. My goal is to add more paths to take and things to do aside from the vanilla gameplay loop, without devaluing or disrupting it. The additional mods aside from Origins and Create will vary and change depending on the game version, mod loader, and what mods are available for the current update.

This modpack is created and maintained for a private group and server, so changes, additions, and removals will depend on the activity of that group. Legacy versions of this modpack will still be available, but only the last version before a major update.
